footer.description: Austria India Trade and Education Association (AITEA) promotes bilateral cooperation, cultural understanding, and strategic partnerships between Austria and India.
footer.copyright: © 2026 AITEA. All Rights Reserved. Built with EU-India values.

cta.title: Shape the Future of Indo-Austrian Relations
cta.description: Join AITEA today to unlock exclusive networking opportunities, strategic partnerships, and access to cross-border initiatives in education, technology, and trade.

partners.title: Our Collaboration & Strategic Partners
partners.subtitle: Connecting leading organizations and government bodies across Austria and India.

home.hero_title: AITEA: Bridging Austria–India Collaboration & Trade Partnerships
home.hero_subtitle: Bridging Trade, Technology, Education, and Culture to foster a resilient strategic partnership between two dynamic regions.
home.overview_text: The Austrian-Indian Talent Exchange Association (AITEA) represents a pioneering platform dedicated to establishing strong, bilateral linkages between Austria and India. Driven by European values and strategic global ambitions, we unite founders, industry leaders, educational institutes, and cultural ambassadors to create mutual prosperity.
home.sectors_subtitle: Fostering growth and knowledge-sharing across six core sectors.

about.title: About AITEA
about.subtitle: Discover our mission, our values, and the bridge we build between Austria and India.
about.overview_text: The Austria-India Trade and Education Association (AITEA) is a non-profit organization established to act as a bridge for commerce, academic research, technological exchange, and cultural appreciation. We operate on a foundation of integrity, sustainability, and mutual respect, aligning with European Union guidelines and India's emerging global presence.
about.mission_text: Our mission is to create sustainable, long-term avenues of collaboration between Austrian and Indian institutions. We envision a future where borders present no barrier to the exchange of knowledge, innovation, and shared heritage, building a resilient strategic network.
about.collab_text: Austria, with its precision engineering, stable economy, and rich cultural legacy, matches perfectly with India's scale, technological dynamism, and youthful energy. AITEA actively facilitates high-level dialogue, business matchmaking, and academic exchange programs to capitalize on these complementary strengths.
about.values_text: We operate with a deep commitment to transparency, rule of law, human rights, and environmental sustainability. All of AITEA's programs adhere to the highest compliance standards, reflecting the core democratic values shared by Austria and India.
about.why_exists_text: Despite strong mutual interests, businesses and educational institutions often struggle to navigate the regulatory, cultural, and administrative landscapes of cross-border operations. AITEA provides localized intelligence, network access, and translation of opportunities to bridge this gap.
about.goal_1: Establish 50+ institutional and trade partnerships by 2028.
about.goal_2: Facilitate exchange programs for students, sportspersons, and technologists.
about.goal_3: Promote cross-border sustainable development initiatives aligning with EU Green Deal goals.

founders.title: The Founders of AITEA
founders.subtitle: Meet the visionary leadership steering AITEA's strategic mission.
founders.gerd_bio: Gerd Saalfrank is an accomplished entrepreneur and strategic consultant with over 25 years of experience in international trade, corporate strategy, and cross-border project management. Having worked extensively in both Central Europe and Southern Asia, he brings a deep understanding of market integration and institutional networks.
founders.gerd_message: Our goal is simple yet profound: to build a permanent, reliable pipeline of trade, education, and mutual growth between Austria and India. By creating AITEA, we are offering public and private entities a formal, values-based platform to explore and execute collaborative initiatives.
founders.erwin_bio: Erwin Rader is a distinguished educationalist and business adviser based in Vienna. He has designed several high-impact training curricula and corporate partnership frameworks. His passion is leveraging Austria's specialized vocational education systems to foster talent development in India.
founders.erwin_message: AITEA represents a vehicle for human capital development. By combining Austrian educational standards with India's immense human talent pool, we create a win-win scenario that benefits businesses, universities, and communities in both nations.
founders.exp_2: Established networks in Austrian chambers of commerce and Indian ministries
founders.exp_3: Deep expertise in European compliance, EU-India trade regulations, and vocational standards

leadership.title: Leadership & Advisory Board
leadership.subtitle: Guided by experienced leaders dedicated to promoting bilateral success.
leadership.board_1_desc: Expert in European international law and commercial treaties.
leadership.board_2_desc: Corporate relations director specializing in Indo-Germanic trade corridors.
leadership.advisor_1_desc: Dean of International Relations at a leading Austrian University of Applied Sciences.
leadership.advisor_2_desc: Venture capitalist and tech pioneer bridging Bengaluru and Vienna.

sectors_trans.culture_desc: Strengthening cultural bonds and fostering mutual appreciation through art, heritage, and exchange.
sectors_trans.education_desc: Bridging academic institutions and enabling student, researcher, and vocational training exchanges.
sectors_trans.sports_desc: Promoting sports diplomacy, training collaborations, and youth athletic exchange programs.
sectors_trans.tourism_desc: Developing sustainable tourism concepts and increasing visitor flow between Austria and India.
sectors_trans.gastronomy_desc: Celebrating culinary diversity and facilitating professional chef exchange and culinary training.
sectors_trans.technology_desc: Fostering collaboration in R&D, green technologies, digital transformation, and startup ecosystems.

culture.title: Culture Sector
culture.subtitle: Fostering cross-cultural dialogues and rich heritage exchanges.
culture.overview: We celebrate heritage and diversity through structured cultural exchange programs between Austria and India.
culture.obj_1: Organize annual bilateral cultural festivals in Vienna and New Delhi.
culture.obj_3: Preserve and digitize heritage links between the two regions.
culture.partnerships: Collaborating with Ministry of Culture (India), Federal Ministry for Arts & Culture (Austria), and numerous cultural foundations.

education.title: Education Sector
education.subtitle: Fostering academic cooperation and education partnerships between Austria and India.
education.overview: We promote joint university research, dual degree pathways, and the integration of the Austrian 'Dual System' of vocational training to support skill development.
education.obj_2: Align vocational training curricula for skilled labor mobility.
education.prog_2: Austrian Dual Vocational Pilot in India
education.partnerships: Partnering with leading Austrian Universities of Applied Sciences and Indian IITs/Universities.

sports.title: Sports Sector
sports.subtitle: Promoting sports diplomacy and athletic exchanges.
sports.overview: Leveraging Austria's excellence in winter sports, football academies, and sports science alongside India's emerging sporting prowess to train the athletes of tomorrow.
sports.obj_3: Promote youth sports tournaments and exchange camps.
sports.prog_1: Alpine Winter Sports Academy for Indian Coaches
sports.partnerships: Active ties with Austrian national sports federations and Indian sports academies.

tourism.title: Tourism Sector
tourism.subtitle: Promoting sustainable tourism and cultural exploration.
tourism.overview: Enhancing bilateral travel, promoting lesser-known eco-tourism destinations, and implementing sustainable hospitality standards across regions.
tourism.obj_1: Advise on sustainable alpine and rural tourism strategies.
tourism.obj_2: Boost business travel and MICE (Meetings, Incentives, Conferences, Exhibitions) segments.
tourism.partnerships: Supported by national tourism boards and leading hospitality chains.

gastronomy.title: Gastronomy Sector
gastronomy.subtitle: Celebrating culinary diversity and training.
gastronomy.overview: Connecting the rich culinary traditions of Austria (Viennese cafe culture, pastries) and India (diverse spices, regional cuisines) through culinary exchanges and professional education.
gastronomy.obj_3: Promote sustainable food production and heritage cuisines.
gastronomy.partnerships: Supported by culinary institutes, organic farming unions, and hotel associations.

technology.title: Technology Sector
technology.subtitle: Fostering green technologies, R&D, and startup cooperation.
technology.overview: Bringing together Austrian precision engineering/green tech and India's software power to create joint innovations in climate tech, AI, and digital infrastructure.
technology.obj_1: Match Austrian clean-tech startups with Indian manufacturing scale.
technology.obj_2: Promote joint research in Artificial Intelligence and Industry 4.0.
technology.obj_3: Support tech talent pipelines and startup landing pads.
technology.partnerships: Collaborating with technology hubs in Vienna, Bengaluru, Munich, and Mumbai.

events.title: AITEA Events & Activities
events.subtitle: Explore our upcoming initiatives and review our past activities.
events.event_1_desc: Bringing together policymakers, researchers, and tech founders to drive green hydrogen and sustainable city solutions.
events.event_2_desc: Discussing dual-education curriculum frameworks and skilled talent exchange between Austria and Indian institutes.
events.event_past_desc: An evening celebrating the fusion of Indian classical dance and Austrian orchestral music, attended by dignitaries from both nations.

news.title: News & Announcements
news.subtitle: Get the latest updates on partnerships, trade, and AITEA initiatives.
news.news_1_title: AITEA Announces Partnership with Austrian Technical Universities
news.news_1_desc: A breakthrough agreement establishing joint research in digital manufacturing and smart grid technologies.
news.news_2_title: Indo-Austrian Trade Corridor Sees 15% Growth in Q1
news.news_2_desc: Bilateral trade figures highlight expanding demand for engineering services, organic exports, and software tools.
news.news_3_title: AITEA Welcomes New Advisory Board Members
news.news_3_desc: Welcoming leaders from academia, renewable energy, and cultural preservation to our strategic guidance body.

downloads.title: Document Center & Downloads
downloads.subtitle: Access our official files, membership applications, and educational brochures.
downloads.doc_membership_desc: Official form (PDF) required to apply for individual or corporate membership.
downloads.doc_statutes_desc: The legally registered constitutional statutes of the association in Austria (German/English).
downloads.doc_brochure_desc: A complete overview of our focus sectors, long-term goals, and strategic benefits.
downloads.doc_report_desc: A report detailing regulatory compliance and trade opportunities for small and medium enterprises.

membership.title: AITEA Membership
membership.subtitle: Become part of a high-impact network driving Austria-India collaboration.
membership.benefit_1_desc: Access exclusive events designed for business networking between Austria and India.
membership.benefit_2_desc: Have your challenges heard and addressed in bilateral trade forums and roundtable dialogues.
membership.benefit_3_desc: Receive advisory support and partnership matching for cross-border projects and academic research.
membership.cat_indiv_desc: For professionals, researchers, students, or consultants looking to contribute and expand their personal network.
membership.cat_corp_desc: For companies seeking market access, joint venture matchmaking, and legal/regulatory intelligence guidance.
membership.cat_inst_desc: For universities, research institutes, sports organizations, and cultural foundations seeking formal MoUs.
membership.step_1_desc: Fill out the online form or download the PDF application and email it to us.
membership.step_2_desc: Our board reviews the application to ensure alignment with our values and compliance.
membership.step_3_desc: Upon approval, you will receive an official notification and invoice for dues.
membership.step_4_desc: Gain immediate access to our member portal, events, and advisory services.
membership.faq_1_a: Any citizen, business, university, or organization registered in Austria, India, or European Union states that aligns with our statutes and values.
membership.faq_2_a: No, AITEA is an independent, non-profit association registered under Austrian law, though we collaborate with government agencies.
membership.faq_3_a: 100% of the dues are reinvested in funding bilateral events, student exchanges, maintaining resource publications, and administrative compliance.

contact.subtitle: Get in touch with our team in Vienna or New Delhi.

contact.subject: Subject

contact.success_msg: Thank you! Your message has been sent successfully. We will contact you soon.

legal.privacy_text: This privacy policy explains how AITEA handles your personal data, in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and Austrian data privacy laws. We collect minimal personal data necessary for membership, event coordination, and newsletters. We do not sell your data.
legal.impressum_text:
Information according to Section 5 of the Austrian E-Commerce Act (ECG) and disclosure according to Section 25 of the Austrian Media Act:

Association Name: Austria India Trade and Education Association (AITEA)
Registration Number (ZVR): 123456789 (Austrian Register of Associations)
Headquarters: Vienna, Austria
Postal Address: Kärntner Straße 12, 1010 Wien
Email: office@aitea.org
Board Representatives: Gerd Saalfrank (Co-Founder), Hans Müller (President)
Association Purpose: Promotion of bilateral relations, education partnerships, and cultural exchanges.
legal.data_protection_text: In accordance with European data regulations, you have the right to access, rectify, or request deletion of your personal data stored with us at any time. For questions regarding data processing, please contact our data officer at privacy@aitea.org.
legal.statutes_text:
The Austria India Trade and Education Association (AITEA) is governed by its official bylaws ('Statuten') registered with the Landespolizeidirektion Wien. Key points include:
1. Non-profit orientation (Gemeinnützigkeit) - all funds must be used for public welfare and the stated purposes of the association.
2. General assembly rights for members.
3. Board responsibilities and arbitration rules.
